Name: Initial Load Success
Description: Verify pins are fetched and displayed when the page loads
Prerequisits: Backend running with at least 2 pins in DB
Testing Steps: 1. Start backend and frontend. 2. Open browser to frontend URL.
Expected Output: Pins are displayed in a grid matching the DB entries

Name: View Pin Details
Description: Verify clicking a pin opens the modal with full details
Prerequisits: Backend running, at least 1 pin exists
Testing Steps: 1. Load frontend. 2. Click on a pin card.
Expected Output: Modal opens, shows 'Loading...', then displays full pin data (author, date, body, image)

Name: Close Modal via Button
Description: Verify the 'X' button closes the modal
Testing Steps: 1. Click the 'X' button in the top right of the modal.

Name: Close Modal via Overlay
Description: Verify clicking the dark background closes the modal
Testing Steps: 1. Click the dark area outside the white modal content box.

Name: Search Filter by Title (Button)
Description: Verify searching filters the pins correctly using the button
Prerequisits: Backend running, multiple pins with different titles (e.g., Ubuntu, Fedora)
Testing Steps: 1. Type "Ubuntu" in the search bar. 2. Click "Search" button.
Expected Output: Only pins containing "Ubuntu" in the title are displayed

Name: Search Filter by Title (Enter Key)
Description: Verify pressing Enter inside the input triggers the search
Prerequisits: Backend running, multiple pins with different titles
Testing Steps: 1. Type "Fedora" in the search bar. 2. Press "Enter" on keyboard.
Expected Output: Only pins containing "Fedora" in the title are displayed

Name: Clear Search Filter
Description: Verify the Clear button resets the search and shows all pins
Prerequisits: A search filter is currently applied
Expected Output: Search bar text empties and all original pins are fetched and displayed
Actual Output: Search cleared and all pins restored
